summary: Unassigned Bookings and Calendar Features Testing - All features verified working correctly. Backend API tests (14/14 passed) and frontend UI tests confirm: cancelled bookings filtered from calendar, OTA Sync button visible, Cancel button in sidebar, room_type enrichment working, and room assignment API functional.
critical_code_review_comments: room_type enrichment in reservation_read_service.py works via get_room_for_tenant_public
handleAssignRoom calls PUT /api/pms/bookings/{id} with room_id update
OTA Sync button (sync-reservations-btn) visible and functional
Cancel button (sidebar-cancel-booking-btn) visible for non-cancelled bookings
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data (6 bookings: 4 cancelled, 2 unassigned)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Calendar features verified: (1) Cancelled bookings (Ahmet Saka, Ali Veli, Ilayda Sutay, Murat Sutay) are correctly filtered out and NOT displayed on calendar. (2) Two unassigned bookings (Test Misafir, Deluxe Misafir) are visible with 'Atanmamış' text. (3) OTA Sync button is in calendar header with data-testid='sync-reservations-btn'. (4) Cancel button in sidebar has data-testid='sidebar-cancel-booking-btn' and is only shown for non-cancelled/non-checked-in bookings. (5) PUT /api/pms/bookings/{id} successfully updates room_id for room assignment. Note: The unassigned bookings are now shown within their room_type section rows (not in a separate ATANMAMIŞ row at top) - they display on room 101 and 109 rows after being assigned during testing.

cancelled_bookings_filtered.details: 4 cancelled bookings (Ahmet Saka, Ali Veli, Ilayda Sutay, Murat Sutay) are NOT visible on calendar grid. Only 2 active bookings shown.

room_type_enrichment.details: GET /api/pms/bookings returns room_type for all bookings, enriched from rooms collection via get_room_for_tenant_public

unassigned_bookings_display.details: Unassigned bookings (room_id=null) appear in calendar. 'Atanmamış' text appears 2 times in page content.

ota_sync_button.details: OTA Sync button visible in calendar header with text 'OTA Sync' and data-testid='sync-reservations-btn'

cancel_button_sidebar.details: Cancel button ('Rezervasyonu İptal Et') visible in sidebar with data-testid='sidebar-cancel-booking-btn' for non-cancelled bookings

room_assignment_api.details: PUT /api/pms/bookings/{id} accepts room_id in body and updates booking successfully

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/pms/bookings: 200 OK - Returns bookings with room_type enriched
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/pms/rooms: 200 OK - Returns rooms with room_type field

screenshots_captured: .screenshots/calendar_page.png - Calendar with OTA Sync button visible
.screenshots/calendar_fullview.png - Full calendar showing both unassigned bookings
